title: calophyllum pelewense
intro: Calophyllum pelewense is a species of plant in the family Calophyllaceae, commonly known as the Pala tree, which is native to the Pacific islands. The medicinal properties of Calophyllum pelewense include its antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of various compounds such as calophyllic acid and lupeol. The health benefits of Calophyllum pelewense include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of malaria, as well as its potential to prevent the development of cancer cells. Calophyllum pelewense can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall health and well-being.
